response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the first song 'Happy End Princess' via on-screen text and the second song 'Meitantei Renzoku Satsujin Jiken' via on-screen text and credits (Teniwoha). 2. Used search queries: '"Happy End Princess" Japanese and English lyrics' and '"名探偵連続殺人事件" Teniwoha Japanese and English lyrics'. 3. Extracted lyrics and mapped to scenes based on timestamps. 4. Compiled into JSON format.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by Hololive VTubers Shirakami Fubuki and Hoshimachi Suisei, with a brief dramatic interlude.

scenes.description: VTubers perform the song "Happy End Princess", with song title in top left.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
女神!聖女!叡智!聡明! 
慈愛!博愛!ですわ! 
あたし なんてったってお姫様 この人生におけるヒロイン 
ですわー! 
一生 姫プでイージーモード! 
って思ったら勝手にどうぞ...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Goddess! Saint! Wisdom! Brilliance! 
Benevolence! Philanthropy! That's how it is! 
I'm, after all, a princess, the heroine in this life 
That's how it is! 
A princess-play easy mode for a lifetime! 
If you think that, go ahead...

scenes.description: VTubers perform the song "Meitantei Renzoku Satsujin Jiken", with song title in bottom center.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ようこそ 名探偵連続殺人事件へ 
ナゾトキ、罠、トリック 
何かがおかしい、何かがおかしい 
この探偵の物語で...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Welcome to the Detective Continuous Murder Case 
It's a riddle, it's a trap, it's a trick 
Something is wrong, something is wrong 
With this detective's story...
